sample_requests: Analyze whether one lineage appears earlier than related lineages in a precomputed dynamo AnnData using topography, graph potentials, and Jacobian outputs
Adapt 400_tutorial_hsc_dynamo_megakaryocytes_appearance.ipynb into a reusable workflow for lineage appearance timing and regulator-pair analysis

smoke_commands.name: worked-example-core-analysis
smoke_commands.command:
${PYTHON} - <<'PY'
from __future__ import annotations

import json
import os
import warnings

os.environ.setdefault("MPLCONFIGDIR", "/tmp/mpl")
os.environ.setdefault("NUMBA_CACHE_DIR", "/tmp/numba")

warnings.filterwarnings("ignore")
warnings.filterwarnings("ignore", message="numpy.dtype size changed")

import matplotlib

matplotlib.use("Agg")

import dynamo as dyn
from dynamo.tools.graph_operators import build_graph, div, potential

adata = dyn.sample_data.hematopoiesis()

cosine_graph = build_graph(adata.obsp["cosine_transition_matrix"])
cosine_div = div(cosine_graph)
adata.obs["cosine_potential_smoke"] = potential(cosine_graph, -cosine_div)

fp_graph = build_graph(adata.obsp["fp_transition_rate"])
fp_div = div(fp_graph)
adata.obs["potential_fp_smoke"] = potential(fp_graph, fp_div)
adata.obs["pseudotime_fp_smoke"] = -adata.obs["potential_fp_smoke"]

genes = ["FLI1", "KLF1"]
dyn.vf.jacobian(adata, regulators=genes, effectors=genes, basis="pca")
jacobian_plot = dyn.pl.jacobian(
    adata,
    regulators=genes,
    effectors=["FLI1"],
    basis="umap",
    save_show_or_return="return",
)

basis = "pca"
dyn.vf.speed(adata, basis=basis)
dyn.vf.divergence(adata, basis=basis)
dyn.vf.acceleration(adata, basis=basis)
dyn.vf.curvature(adata, basis=basis, formula=2)

topography_plot = dyn.pl.topography(
    adata,
    basis="umap",
    fps_basis="umap",
    color=["cell_type"],
    streamline_alpha=0.9,
    save_show_or_return="return",
)

summary = {
    "cosine_potential_smoke": "cosine_potential_smoke" in adata.obs,
    "potential_fp_smoke": "potential_fp_smoke" in adata.obs,
    "pseudotime_fp_smoke": "pseudotime_fp_smoke" in adata.obs,
    "jacobian_pca": "jacobian_pca" in adata.uns,
    "speed_pca": "speed_pca" in adata.obs,
    "divergence_pca": "divergence_pca" in adata.obs,
    "acceleration_pca": "acceleration_pca" in adata.obs,
    "curvature_pca": "curvature_pca" in adata.obs,
    "VecFld_umap": "VecFld_umap" in adata.uns,
    "jacobian_plot_return": type(jacobian_plot).__name__,
    "topography_return": type(topography_plot).__name__,
}

print(json.dumps(summary, sort_keys=True))
PY
